PARAM.description: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.
PARAM.name: strictChecking
PARAM.content: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.

PARAM.description: If true (and strict checking is false), nodes are automatically created when referenced when creating a edge, even if not yet inserted in the graph.
PARAM.name: autoCreate
PARAM.content: If true (and strict checking is false), nodes are automatically created when referenced when creating a edge, even if not yet inserted in the graph.

PARAM.description: Initial capacity of the node storage data structures. Use this if you know the approximate maximum number of nodes of the graph.
PARAM.name: initialNodeCapacity
PARAM.content: Initial capacity of the node storage data structures. Use this if you know the approximate maximum number of nodes of the graph.

PARAM.description: Initial capacity of the edge storage data structures. Use this if you know the approximate maximum number of edges of the graph.
PARAM.name: initialEdgeCapacity
PARAM.content: Initial capacity of the edge storage data structures. Use this if you know the approximate maximum number of edges of the graph.

PARAM.description: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.
PARAM.name: strictChecking
PARAM.content: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.

PARAM.description: If true nodes are automatically created when referenced when creating a edge, even if not yet inserted in the graph.
PARAM.name: autoCreate
